result.method: Grid Wada test (Daza et al. 2018) at 3 independent resolutions; RK4 flip-basin grids, neighbourhood radius 2 cells, candidacy threshold 0.95; verdict from adjacent-resolution deltas <= 0.05.
result.transientHandling: each cell integrated from rest up to maxTime=8s; cells that never flip are their own basin class
result.caveat: Finite-grid evidence only: a converged Wada fraction at several resolutions supports (does not prove) the Wada property. Mathematical proof requires the unrestricted grid-refinement limit or the saddle-straddle method; treat this verdict as numerical evidence with the stated tolerance.
